sol_visage.title: Confirm you have the Sol Visage from Barako the Sun Chief (Mowzie's Mobs — fought in Ch05 ribs)

death_worm_chitin.title: Collect Death Worm Chitin (Ice & Fire — from Death Worm kills in desert biomes, Ch07)

subtitle.text: Objects that are very old remember being old. Handle accordingly.

description: The Old Eye is the Oldest Civilization's inheritance.
They mastered total memory, comprehensive knowledge.
They fell because remembering everything was not enough.
- mowziesmobs:sol_visage (center — Barako the Sun Chief drop, Ch05)
- iceandfire:deathworm_chitin (Death Worm drops, Ch07 desert chain)
Check your storage from Ch05 and Ch07.
The Sol Visage and Death Worm drops should already be there.
